request.prompt:
Determine whether tripleS has any publicly announced events after 2026-07-15 (concerts, tours, or fan meetings). Search for this artist only; do not bundle another artist.

Strict evidence rules: accept only an official artist/company source, promoter, venue, ticketing source, or reliable media. Exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence. Do not guess. A general tour announcement without a dated stop is not an event. If no qualifying public event is found, return NO_EVENTS_FOUND.

For every event you claim, the artist must match and you must provide the complete exact date or date range, venue, city/country, and a structured web-search citation with URL, title, and cited text that directly supports that same event. Do not claim an event without a citation.

Return only these fields in this order:
VERDICT: EVENTS_FOUND | NO_EVENTS_FOUND
EVENT_COUNT: <n>
EVENTS:
- ARTIST: ...
  DATES: ...
  VENUE: ...
  CITY_COUNTRY: ...
  SOURCE_CLASS: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media
  CITATION_URL: ...
  CITED_TEXT: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

content.text: I'll search for tripleS upcoming events using multiple reliable source types.

TripleS Tickets & 2026 Tour Dates | Vivid Seats
Triples Concert & Tour History (Updated for 2026)

tripleS - 2026 Tour Dates & Concert Schedule

tripleS
2023 Winter Meet up with tripleS | tripleS Wiki | Fandom
tripleS ∞! 1st FANMEETING in Japan "SSSch∞!" Mayu ...
tripleS announces two full-group comebacks for 2026 | allkpop
tripleS | tripleS Wiki | Fandom
Triples Fanmeet

content.text: I need to check the official tripleS website and Ticketmaster for any specific upcoming dated events after July 15, 2026.

input.query: tripleS upcoming concert event July August 2026 official announcement

content.title: tripleS - 2026 Tour Dates & Concert Schedule
Triples Concert Tickets - 2026 Tour Dates.
Triples Full Tour Schedule 2026 & 2027, Tour Dates & Concerts – Songkick
TripleS Tickets & 2026 Tour Dates | Vivid Seats
TripleS Tickets & 2026 Concert Tour Dates
tripleS Tickets, 2026 Concert Tour Dates | Ticketmaster
tripleS Tickets - 2026 Concert Tour Dates | Spotify
TripleS Tour Dates 2026 / 2027 - Track Concerts, Shows and Tickets - Stereoboard
tripleS Concerts & Live Tour Dates: 2026-2027 Tickets | Bandsintown

content.text:
---

**VERDICT:** NO_EVENTS_FOUND

**EVENT_COUNT:** 0

**EVENTS:** *(none)*

**REASON:** No qualifying source — official artist/company, promoter, venue, ticketing platform, or reliable media — returned a publicly announced tripleS concert, tour stop, or fan meeting with a confirmed date after 2026-07-15. Ticketmaster explicitly states

citations.cited_text: We're sorry, but we couldn't find any upcoming concerts for tripleS.
citations.title: tripleS Tickets, 2026 Concert Tour Dates | Ticketmaster

content.text: "We're sorry, but we couldn't find any upcoming concerts for tripleS."

citations.cited_text: There are no upcoming events for TripleS. Check back later for new event dates!
citations.title: TripleS Tickets & 2026 Concert Tour Dates

content.text: "There are no upcoming events for TripleS. Check back later for new event dates!"
Vivid Seats offers no listed dates, only noting

citations.cited_text: Even if TripleS hasn't confirmed a tour yet, keep checking back as new shows are added regularly.
citations.title: TripleS Tickets & 2026 Tour Dates | Vivid Seats

content.text: "Even if TripleS hasn't confirmed a tour yet, keep checking back as new shows are added regularly."
The only tour reference found in searches — the *My Secret New Zone* Asia tour —

citations.cited_text: It will start on February 28, 2026 in Taipei, Taiwan.
citations.title: 2026 tripleS OT 24 Concerts in Asia <My Secret New Zone> | Kpop Wiki | Fandom

content.text: started on February 28, 2026 in Taipei, Taiwan
, placing all its known stops well before the July 15, 2026 cutoff date. No official Modhaus/tripleS announcement of any post-July 15, 2026 event was found.
